capabilities.startListening: creates SpeechRecognition instance, push-to-talk, single utterance
capabilities.abort: aborts recognition and resets state to idle
capabilities.onInterimTranscript: fires with partial transcript text during speech
capabilities.onFinalTranscript: fires with final transcript and confidence score
capabilities.onError: fires on recognition error with message

testing_limitation.reason: VPS headless environment — no microphone hardware, no browser with mic permissions
what_was_verified: Text fallback path verified through operatorExperienceStore
testing_limitation.truthful_disclosure: Real microphone capture requires a browser with mic permissions. This cannot be tested in headless/SSH environment.
